overall.description: Gameplay footage from Bloodborne showing a hunter character exploring a candlelit gothic library interior with ornate wooden bookshelves, transitioning through a stone stairwell to emerge onto a snow-covered castle rooftop at night with views of distant spires and a starry sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic library main floor with candlelit bookshelves

events.description: character ascends wooden staircase from ground floor to upper level

agents.ego_description: walking through the ornate library, examining the shelves and ascending a staircase

entered.detail: tall dark wood bookshelves with intricate carvings lining the walls
ornate candelabras with multiple lit candles providing warm illumination
loose papers and books strewn across the floor
dark wood study tables with decorative legs

segments.scene_description: The character explores the ground floor of a gothic library, surrounded by towering wooden bookshelves and warm candlelight. Loose manuscripts litter the marble floor as the character walks past study tables and ascends a staircase to the upper level.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper balcony overlooking the grand library hall

events.description: reaching the balcony edge and looking down at the main hall with the grand chandelier

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper balcony, looking down at the grand chandelier and main floor below

entered.detail: large ornate chandelier hanging from the ceiling of the main hall below
carved wooden railing along the upper walkway
gothic stone archway leading to adjacent rooms

segments.scene_description: From the upper balcony, the character overlooks the grand library hall with its magnificent chandelier hanging below. The perspective shifts to show the bookshelves from above as the character walks along the carved wooden railing toward an arched doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone stairwell ascending to the rooftop exit

events.description: entering the narrow stone stairwell from the library's upper floor
exiting the building from warm candlelit interior to cold moonlit exterior

agents.ego_description: climbing the spiral stone staircase toward the rooftop exit, passing through an archway with icicles

entered.detail: rough-hewn stone walls of the narrow tower staircase
stone archway at the exit draped with icicles

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow stone stairwell, leaving the library behind. The warm candlelight fades as they ascend the spiral stairs toward an archway hung with icicles, transitioning from the interior to the cold night outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered castle rooftop with panoramic views of gothic spires

events.description: emerging from the stairwell onto the snow-covered castle rooftop
character approaches the roof edge and looks down at the courtyard below

agents.ego_description: walking across the snow-covered roof tiles, surveying the vast gothic castlescape with tall spires against the night sky

entered.detail: snow-laden roof tiles covering the castle roof
tall pointed spires of the castle towers against the night sky
curved stone wall of the tower with crenellations
dark starry sky visible above the castle

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto a vast snow-covered rooftop under a starry night sky. The camera reveals a breathtaking view of gothic spires and crenellated towers as the character walks across the snow-laden tiles, eventually approaching the roof's edge to look down at the castle grounds below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a candlelit gothic library that transitions from a ground-level exploration to an elevated perspective of the grand hall. It begins on the marble floor among towering wooden bookshelves and scattered manuscripts, moving past study tables as the character ascends a staircase. As the camera reaches the upper level, the view opens up to reveal a magnificent chandelier hanging over the expanse of the library below. The scene then shifts to a high-angle perspective of the bookshelves as the character walks along a carved wooden railing, finally moving toward an arched doorway.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the warm, enclosed depths of a gothic interior to the freezing expanse of a moonlit rooftop. It begins as the character enters a narrow stone stairwell, leaving the library behind while the warm candlelight fades during the ascent up the spiral stairs. As the camera reaches an archway hung with icicles, the scene shifts from the dim interior to the biting cold of the night. The view then opens onto a vast, snow-covered rooftop under a starry sky, revealing a breathtaking vista of distant gothic spires and crenellated towers. Finally, the camera follows the character across the snow-laden tiles before approaching the roof's edge to look down at the castle grounds below.
